title: Indiana unemployment stays flat in June
description:
Indiana's unemployment rate remained unchanged at 3.3% in June. The Indiana Department of Workforce Development said Tuesday that the state added 1,800 private sector jobs compared to the previous month.

description:

title: Voting begins for Indiana’s Ultimate Farmers Market Challenge
description:
Indiana Grown has opened voting for its fourth annual Indiana's Ultimate Farmers Market Challenge. The contest gives residents the opportunity to vote for their favorite hometown farmers markets.
